_comment: Authoritative Claude vision-review verdicts for the Q2+Q3 image fill. Applied by apply-verdicts.mjs after the gen process is fully stopped (avoids the concurrent-write race that clobbered the live marks). pass = keep; fail = regen with notes.

verdicts.title: Band External Rotation (Prehab)
verdicts.notes: Frame 1 OK. Frame 2 WRONG: shows arm extended forward like a cable row. CORRECT frame 2: elbow STAYS PINNED to ribs at 90°; ONLY the forearm rotates outward away from belly. Upper arm does NOT move. Like opening a door with the forearm only.

verdicts.title: Cable Rope Hammer Curl
verdicts.notes: Frames too similar. Frame 1: ARMS HANGING FULLY STRAIGHT DOWN, rope at HIP/THIGH level, elbows extended. Frame 2: ELBOWS FULLY BENT pinned to ribs, rope brought UP to CHEST level. Show DRAMATIC contrast between extended arms (down) and flexed elbows (up).

verdicts.title: Calf Raise: Seated (Soleus)
verdicts.notes: Frames near-identical. Frame 1: HEELS DROPPED below platform, ankles dorsiflexed (toes up). Frame 2: HEELS RAISED HIGH, full plantar flexion (toes pointing down, calves contracted). Need OBVIOUS heel-down vs heel-up contrast.

verdicts.title: Chest-Supported Row (Machine or T-Bar)
verdicts.notes: Frame 1 OK (arms extended forward). Frame 2 WRONG: still shows arms extended. CORRECT frame 2: handles pulled BACK to LOWER RIBS, elbows back past torso, shoulder blades fully retracted (squeezed). Show clear row finish position with arms bent and handles near body.

verdicts.title: Donkey Calf
verdicts.notes: WRONG EXERCISE. Generated donkey-kick (kneeling on all fours). CORRECT donkey CALF RAISE: STANDING bent at hips, forearms on a railing, torso parallel to floor, balls of feet on a raised platform. Frame 1: heels dropped/stretched. Frame 2: up on tippy-toes (plantar flexion).

verdicts.title: Dumbbell Y-Raise
verdicts.notes: Frame 2 wrong: arms straight out to sides (T-shape lateral raise). CORRECT Y-RAISE: arms raised forward at 30-45° from the sides — forming a Y when viewed front-on. Thumbs UP. Keep hinged hip position (same as frame 1, ~45° forward lean).

verdicts.title: Face Pulls
verdicts.notes: Wrong attachment. Use a ROPE (two ends) not single handle. Frame 1: ROPE at face height, arms fully extended forward. Frame 2: ROPE pulled to FACE — elbows flared OUT to sides at shoulder height, hands at ears, rope ends pulled apart by face. Show pull motion.

verdicts.title: Hip Thrust (Barbell)
verdicts.notes: No movement contrast — both frames show top position. Frame 1 = BOTTOM: hips ON FLOOR, barbell low, knees deeply flexed, lumbar near ground. Frame 2 = TOP: hips at FULL EXTENSION forming a straight line from shoulders to knees, hips high, lockout squeeze.

verdicts.title: Hip Thrust (Barbell) — Banded Pulse
verdicts.notes: Missing resistance BAND around the knees — critical for this variant. Add visible band wrapped around both legs just above knees. Frame 1: hips bottom, band slack. Frame 2: hips top, knees pushing OUTWARD against band creating tension. Pulse position cue: knees apart.

verdicts.title: Overhead Cable Triceps Extension
verdicts.notes: Frame 1 OK (rope behind head, elbows bent). Frame 2 WRONG: arms forward at chest. CORRECT frame 2: arms fully extended UPWARD overhead — rope HIGH above head, elbows STRAIGHT pointing up, biceps near ears. Same body facing as frame 1.

verdicts.title: Pallof Rotations (Band)
verdicts.notes: Rotation not shown. Frame 1: hands extended at chest height in front, torso PERPENDICULAR to band anchor. Frame 2: torso ROTATED 60-90° AWAY from anchor (hips+shoulders twist), hands stay extended but now point further from anchor.
